additionalFields.mediaCaption:
🏁 All done. 

Your order has been finalised, and our dispatch team has been notified of your delivery booking.  

Please find attached your invoice.  

Thank you for your support. 👍

*For customer support or enquiries, contact us at:*

063 693 5532 

gas@hiservice.co.za

parameters.textBody:
This session has ended. No further action is required.
Type 'Hi' into the chat to start a new order.
